item.title: Yamaha Attitude Limited III Billy Sheehan Signature Bass (2011) Black, DiMarzio Relentless Bridge Pickup w/Case Candy & Yamaha Hardshell Case USED — $1,699.99
item.description:
$1,699.99 · Brand New · Main Street Music & Sound

Yamaha Attitude Limited III Billy Sheehan Signature Bass (2011) Black, DiMarzio Relentless Bridge Pickup w/Case Candy & Yamaha Hardshell Case USED

The Yamaha Billy Sheehan Attitude III is a premium Japanese-made signature bass developed in collaboration with legendary bassist Billy Sheehan (Mr. Big, Talas, David Lee Roth). Designed for powerful rock performance, it combines massive low-end punch, exceptional sustain, and remarkable tonal flexibility through its unique dual-pickup and stereo/mono output system. Built at Yamaha's renowned Music Craft facility in Japan, the Attitude III reflects Sheehan's highly customized playing style, featuring a scalloped upper fingerboard, Hipshot D-Tuner, and distinctive dual-output electronics.

This Attitude Limited III is in Excellent Condition, upgraded with a DiMarzio Relentless P-Bass Bridge Pickup. Included with the sale is original hardshell case, certificate of authenticity, booklets and wrenches. The guitar has some light surface swirls in the finish-top and bottom, tarnish/wear on the bridge pickup and a few very, very light ring dings on the back of the neck, not enough to feel while playing.

Note: There is fretwear. Fretwear is as follows: E-String-frets 1-6, A-String-frets 1-11, D-String-frets 1-21, G-String-frets 1-21. Frets 4 and 7 are slightly high. 
The consigner would prefer to sell the bass with the current Billy Sheehan strings on it. They could use replacing but still plays great. Case is in great shape. 

See Photos. Please call the store if you have questions.

Key Features

  • Made in Japan (Yamaha Music Craft)
  • Billy Sheehan Signature Model
  • 34" scale length, 4-string electric bass
  • Alder body with Yamaha's spline-joint construction for enhanced resonance
  • Bolt-on maple neck with reinforced miter-bolting neck joint
  • Maple fingerboard with scalloped frets 17–21
  • 21 frets (Jumbo frets 1–16, Medium frets 17–21)
  • Yamaha-designed DiMarzio Woofer neck pickup
  • Aftermarket DiMarzio Relentless middle pickup
  • Stereo and mono output capability
  • Independent volume controls for each pickup
  • Woofer tone control with high-cut switch
  • Hipshot D-Tuner for instant Drop-D tuning
  • White pearl 3-ply pickguard
  • Gloss polyurethane body finish
  • Satin polyurethane neck finish
  • Includes original hardshell case

*NOTE: Shipping and Insurance on this item will vary depending on shipping destination. Please call the store for exact shipping cost!! West Coast may be slightly higher; East Coast may be lower than estimated shipping on our website or Reverb.com

item.description:
$1,399.95 · Very Good · Parkway Music

The Fender American Professional II Precision Bass features a comfortable '63 P Bass neck with rolled edges and a satin finish. Its V-Mod II split-coil pickup offers clear, punchy tones, making it versatile for professional players seeking classic sound and modern playability.

  • SN: US23039757
  • Weight: 8lbs 5.6oz
  • Year: 2023
  • Finish: Mercury
  • Alder Body
  • Maple Neck
  • Rosewood Fingerboard
  • '63 "C" Neck Profile
  • 9.5" Radius

  • V-Mod II Split-Coil Pickup
  • Original Fender Hardshell Case Included
  • Used: Very Good Condition - See photos for pickguard scratching.

item.title: Yamaha Attitude II Billy Sheehan Signature Electric Bass (2009) Lava Red, DiMarzio Relentless Gold Pickup w/Hardshell Case USED — $1,699.99
item.description:
$1,699.99 · Excellent · Main Street Music & Sound

Yamaha Attitude II Billy Sheehan Signature Electric Bass (2009) Lava Red, DiMarzio Relentless Gold Pickup w/Hardshell Case USED

An exciting collaboration between Billy Sheehan and Yamaha's North Hollywood workshop, this is a bass loaded with innovative features and a huge sound.

Billy Sheehan's trademark giant sound owes much to his DiMarzio pickups, and the Attitude Limited II's Will Powers deliver the goods big-time. This bass is fitted with an aftermarket DiMarzio Relentless Gold Pickup in the bridge position. The neck woofer - with a high-cut facility - is known for its ultra-deep character and superb definition; the middle pickup is a split-coil P-style packed with tremendous punch and midrange power. To extend performance and recording versatility, the pickups are wired to separate outputs, allowing the choice between combining the two sounds or amplifying them separately. The Attitude II also features a neat Hipshot tuner, enabling the E string to be dropped accurately down to D at the flick of a lever.
Comes with certificate of authenticity signed by Billy Sheehan!! Made in Japan.

This Attitude LTD II is in Excellent Condition. Strings could use replacing but still plays great. Comes additionally with original bridge pickup included in the purchase. Neck is straight and action is low. It is ready to be played! See Photos. Please call the store if you have questions.

item.title: 1970s Hagstrom Super Swede Bass — $1,095
item.description:
$1,095 · Very Good · Emerald City Guitars

This 1970s Hagstrom Super Swede Bass is a great, band-for-your-buck vintage bass! Kind of its own thing, but akin to a Les Paul bass producing a unique vocal quality with impressive sustain and tons of character. It is lightly used, clean for its age, with a few dings, moderate playwear, and a cracked neck pickup ring. This would be an excellent addition to any arsenal! These are rare to see, so don't miss your chance to snag it.

item.title: Ibanez SB900 1992 - Sparkle Black (Refin) — $970
item.description:
$970 · Excellent · Stuart's Gear Bazaar

If you are reading this you probably know that this is one of the hardest to find of Ibanez basses. The SB900 Sabre was made in Japan between 1990-91 and apparently only around 500 were made. It has the thinnest body and neck on any bass I've ever played. Super low action and It's incredibly light. This one has been refinished in a sparkle black and modded with awesome Adhere Pro Z Preamp electronics for incredible tone. Everything else is original and it comes with the original electronics as well. This bass absolutely growls. If you are in the market for a bass that won't break your back or the bank, you won't go wrong with this one.

item.title: Fender Duff McKagan Deluxe Precision Bass, Rosewood Fingerboard, Black (T1) (00248) — $1,219
item.description:
$1,219 · Excellent · Franklin Guitar Works

Weight - 9lb 7oz

Up for sale is a Fender Duff McKagan DLX Precision Bass black finish. This one came to us in great shape and plays fantastic. The electronics have been play tested and are working as they should. This one may have some very light surface scratching, but it is in overall excellent condition. This one comes with the original Fender DLX gig bag.

The Duff McKagan Deluxe Precision Bass is based on the '80s Jazz Bass Special he used while recording Appetite for Destruction. An evolution of his signature model, this bass adds player-friendly features and stylistic touches that Duff demands.The black-painted "Modern C"-shaped quartersawn maple neck has a "Deluxe Jazz Bass Special" headstock logo and hosts a rosewood fingerboard with pearloid block inlays, along with the number "12" at the twelfth fret. A must-have for live performance, the Hipshot Bass Xtender allows instant drop-tuning with the flick of a lever.

Duff's signature sound comes from pairing a Fender vintage-style Precision Bass split-coil pickup with a Seymour Duncan STKJ2B Jazz Bass single-coil bridge pickup. This thunderous tone can be shaped precisely by the Fender TBX (Treble/Bass Expander) tone circuit.Additional features include a Pure Vintage '70s bridge and, as a special touch, a Duff skull n' crossbones neck plate. Includes deluxe gig bag.


SKU:0146510306


Franklin Guitar Works - Who We Are
FGW is a division of MIRC, LLC (Musical Instrument Reclamation Company), located in La Vergne, TN.  MIRC is the world’s largest refurbisher of stringed instruments.  We partner with the leading manufacturers in the industry, helping them recondition their distressed instruments. All of our instruments have been inspected, set up, and refurbished by our certified technicians to ensure you are receiving a quality instrument.

Hours of Operation
Our online Business hours are Monday - Friday 7:30 am to 4:00 pm CST. Closed on weekends and holidays.

Shipping Policy
Free ground shipping within the continental USA. Items under $20 will have a $9.95 shipping charge. We do not offer international shipping.
We cannot ship to a PO Box. Orders require a physical mailing address to be processed.
All orders over $500 will be shipped with a direct Signature Requirement to ensure it is received. If the signature requirement is refused, the customer will assume responsibility for the package once it reaches the delivery address.

Orders are processed Monday through Friday, 7:30am - 4:00pm CST. Shipments are prepared in the order that they are received. We make every effort to expedite orders as quickly as possible, but we cannot guarantee ship dates. Please allow up to 3 business days for tracking information. 

Thank you for trusting us with your business.

Attualmente monta corde Fender Flatwound (50-100) che valorizzano molto il carattere vintage dello strumento.


Il basso è completamente originale e intonso, senza modifiche, segni o difetti.

Vendo semplicemente per ridurre il numero di strumenti. Disponibile a prove, consegna a mano a Genova.

item.title: 1966 Fender Jazz Bass Candy Apple Red #120270 — $27,179
item.description:
$27,179 · Good · Thunder Road Guitars PDX

Impressive that you've managed to tear your eyes away from the photos of this beautiful bass for long enough to read the description! This 1966 Fender Jazz Bass is truly All-Original, even including its original pickup and bridge covers and hard shell case. In stunning Candy Apple Red with matching painted headstock, this one is a rare treasure!

Freshly inspected and set up in-house by our esteemed Guitar Tech. In Good Vintage condition with moderate wear for an instrument of this age, including scratches, nicks, aging of parts and finish, and other remnants of its life as a beloved instrument. See below for more details and specifications.

___________________________________________________________________

SPECIFICATIONS:

Nickel Hardware

Original Fender Lollipop Tuners

1.5” Bone Nut 

Maple Neck with 34” Scale Length, stamped 7OCT65A

Neck Thickness .80" at First Fret and .96" at Twelfth Fret

Brazilian Rosewood Fingerboard with Dot Inlays and 7.25" Radius

20 Medium Frets in Excellent Condition

2 J-Bass Single Coil Pickups and Pots Dated 42nd Week of 1965

Original 4-Saddle Top-Loading Bridge

Alder Body Body in Candy Apple Red Finish w/Matching Painted Headstock

Weight 9 lb 4 oz

Original Hard Shell Case

Serial Number 120270

__________________________________________________________________

NOTE TO OUR VALUED CUSTOMERS:

We want you to be happy with your purchase and we try to represent the condition of all used and vintage guitars as accurately as possible in our listings. Every used guitar shows some signs of play wear and vintage models even more so. We call out all areas of damage or unusual wear, and describe the overall condition based upon what is "normal" for the age of the instrument. Expect to see minor dings, finish checking, or other evidence of normal use and aging which may not be captured by photography or explicitly mentioned in the listing.  

We recognize that everyone has their own personal standard of what constitutes acceptable wear and tear. If play wear is especially critical for you, please contact us to ask any questions you may have. Your satisfaction is of paramount importance to us.

item.title: Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass V Roasted Pine Maple Fingerboard — $2,149.99
item.description:
$2,149.99 · Brand New · Fuller's Guitar

- Fender Authorized Dealer - This item is Brand New with Full Factory Warranty.

- The photos shown are of the actual instrument being sold.

- Our luthiers at Fuller's Guitar thoroughly inspect and set up each instrument (to factory spec action and neck relief) prior to shipping to make sure that your new instrument is gig-ready right out of the box.

- Buy risk-free with our 14 day return policy (full refund, less shipping). Check out our shop policies for more details.

The American Professional II Jazz Bass® V draws from more than sixty years of innovation, inspiration and evolution to meet the demands of today's working player.

Our popular Slim "C" neck now sports smooth rolled fingerboard edges, a "Super-Natural" satin finish and a newly sculpted neck heel for a supremely comfortable feel and easy access to the upper register. New V-Mod II Jazz Bass V single-coil pickups are more articulate than ever while delivering the punch and clarity the Jazz Bass is known for.

The American Pro II Jazz Bass V delivers instant familiarity and sonic versatility you'll feel and hear right away, with broad ranging improvements that add up to nothing less than a new standard for professional instruments.

FEATURES
Two V-Mod II single-coil Jazz Bass V pickups
Slim "C"-shaped neck profile with rolled fingerboard edges
Bone nut; 20 narrow-tall frets
HiMass™ Vintage bridge for increased sustain
Posiflex graphite rods for neck reinforcement

item.title: Fender Precision Bass Parts Build 2025 - Shell Pink Nitro — $1,695
item.description:
$1,695 · Very Good · David's Gear Depot

Built around a lightweight Guitar Mill alder body (under 4.9 lbs), this custom Precision Bass combines vintage aesthetics with modern reliability. The body was finished in nitrocellulose lacquer in Shell Pink with an aged clear coat and hand-buffed to a smooth semi-gloss sheen. The aging is intentionally organic, so some areas show more ambering than others, giving it a naturally broken-in appearance.

The neck is a Fender American Original ’50s Precision Bass maple neck with a bone nut. Electronics feature Aguilar PJ pickups, providing everything from classic Precision punch to added versatility from the bridge pickup. Hardware includes a gold-plated Leo Quan Badass II bridge and lightweight Gotoh Res-O-Lite tuners for excellent tuning stability and balance.

The bass has been well cared for and is in excellent condition. It plays smoothly, sounds great, and has been professionally assembled and set up.

Please note:

  • No case is included.
  • The bass will be professionally packed in a properly sized guitar shipping box with ample protective padding to ensure it arrives safely.

Specifications:

  • Lightweight Guitar Mill alder body (under 4.9 lbs.)
  • Nitrocellulose Shell Pink finish with aged clear coat
  • Semi-gloss hand-buffed finish
  • Fender American Original ’50s Precision Bass neck
  • Bone nut
  • Aguilar PJ pickups
  • Gold Leo Quan Badass II bridge
  • Lightweight Gotoh Res-O-Lite tuners
  • Gold hardware throughout

item.title: Stick Enterprises 12-String Grand Stick - Padauk Body - PASV-4 Block — $4,250
item.description:
$4,250 · Excellent · Your Gear Quest

Up for sale is a stunning, beautifully crafted 12-String Grand Stick by Stick Enterprises (Serial #7348). Built from premium, highly resonant Padauk tonewood, this progressive tapping instrument offers an incredibly wide sonic range and an effortless playing response.

The Grand Stick model features a slightly wider string spacing compared to the standard 10-string models, making it the premier choice for players who want maximum harmonic freedom across distinct bass and melody registers.

🎛️ Factory Electronics & Hardware

This model comes factory-equipped with the highly sought-after PASV-4 (Villex) pickup block. This passive module features a 4-position rotary switch that lets you sweep through distinct internal filtering curves, allowing you to easily morph the instrument's tone from smooth, woody acoustic warmth to sharp, modern bite with zero active battery noise.

The headstock is fitted with premium, ultra-reliable black closed-gear Hipshot tuners for rock-solid tuning stability across all 12 strings.

🎒 Included Premium Accessories

Skip the multi-year factory waitlist and get a complete, plug-and-play performance rig immediately. This listing includes:

  1. Premium Leather-Style Soft Case: A gorgeous, heavy-duty, form-fitting soft case that offers excellent protection while keeping the instrument lightweight and easy to transport.
  2. Official Stereo Splitter Cable: Essential for the true Chapman Stick experience. This specialized cable automatically splits the bass strings and melody strings into two separate output channels, allowing you to route them to two different amplifiers or audio interface inputs for massive stereo tracking.

📝 Full Specifications:

  • Brand: Stick Enterprises (Chapman Stick)
  • Model: 12-String Grand Stick
  • Serial Number: 7348
  • Body Wood: Solid Padauk
  • Tuning Configuration: Classic Tuning
  • String Gauge: Medium Gauge
  • Pickup System: PASV-4 Passive Component Block
  • Hardware: Black Closed-Gear Hipshot Tuners
  • Inlays: White Pearl Dots
  • Accessories Included: Leather-style soft gig bag, stereo breakout cable

Condition:

Excellent condition. The Padauk wood grain looks gorgeous with vibrant coloring. The neck is straight, frets show virtually no wear, and the PASV-4 electronics function flawlessly with a clean, quiet signal output. The case zippers, straps, and interior are all in fantastic shape.

$1,016 · Good · The Crystal Skull Shop

Fender is the number one brand of electric guitars and basses.

Loved by countless top artists including James Jamerson, Bobby Vega, Michael League, and more.

The Precision Bass was introduced as the world's first solid electric bass with frettes, and quickly captivated bassists around the world.
Even now, more than half a century has passed since its birth, its brilliance remains unchanged and is loved.

Fender Japan started in the 80's as a Japanese-made Fender, but unfortunately it has now been discontinued and integrated into the Fender itself.

This is the top model PB70US.

The body is Alder and the fingerboard is Rosewood.
Of course the PU is US PU.

It is an attractive individual with a comfortable and bouncy nuance that is typical of a P Bass.

Approximately 90% of the frets remain.
The truss rod works well.
The condition of the neck is that there is a slight twist on the first string side. Currently it is adjusted to 2.0-2.5mm (12F). Since the treble string side of the 19F is slightly floating, a buzz will occur when you press the 18F string. (This problem can be solved by increasing the 12F string height to 2.5mm.)
The condition of the body and painted surface shows some signs of use.
The electrical system is in good condition.
No obvious modification points were found.

Controls: volume, tone
Nut width: 41.0mm
Bridge string pitch: 20.0mm
Scale: 34Inch
Year of manufacture: 2002-2004
Country of manufacture: JAPAN

Accessories: Soft case

item.title: 2024 Soundgear by Ibanez SR300E-SVM Sky Veil Matte 4 String Bass W/ Gig Bag — $349.95
item.description:
$349.95 · Excellent · Lps Inc

This guitar is in excellent condition no scratches, dings or dents.


Stock # J78013335-ZL/7.8XA

SHIPPING TO CONTINENTAL UNITED STATES ONLY

IBANEZ SR300E 4-STRING ELECTRIC BASS, SKY VEIL MATTE (SVM) FINISH, Gig Bag, 3 BAND EQ

For 30 years the SR has given bass players a modern alternative. With its continued popularity, Ibanez is constantly endeavoring to answer the wider needs of a variety of players, at a variety of budgets. But no matter what the specs, the heart is the same-SR continues to excite with its smooth, fast neck, lightweight body, and perfectly matched electronics.

This Ibanez SR300E Bass Guitar & Case is a used item in Mint condition. Please review pics for your satisfaction. There are a few unintentional light reflections that appear and are not part of grading. The bass still has hang tags and plastic covers on the pickups on it as it looks unplayed. This comes in an Ibanez case that is in excellent shape. You will receive this item well-packed but its any original packaging or paperwork. Please contact this seller for additional information. Returns are limited so please ask all questions before bidding as your satisfaction is important to me before you purchase. Customer 100% satisfaction is our one and only goal. The only way to show that to our customers is via our feedback. If for some reason you are not 100% satisfied, please do not leave negative or neutral feedback. Give us a chance to fix or resolve any problem you may have with your transaction. We want to earn every single positive feedback because we don't plan to work with you only once, we want you to come back. All payments need to clear before shipping. Insurance included with shipping. Buyer is responsible for any and all local taxes or custom duties with this purchase. Most importantly, thank you for looking!

SPECIFICATIONS

Neck Type: SR4 5-Piece Maple/Walnut Neck

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Stingray 1992 - WHITE MAPLE — $1,850
item.description:
$1,850 · Good · Flemington Guitar Shop

The 1992 Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay 4-String 3EQ in White with a Maple fretboard is a highly collectible vintage instrument from the "flea-era" of early Ernie Ball production.

  • Electronics: Active 3-Band EQ (Volume, Treble, Mid, Bass knobs) powered by a 9V battery.
  • Pickup: Original high-output Music Man Alnico humbucker.
  • Body & Finish: Select hardwood (typically Ash) finished in high-gloss White, featuring a contoured body for playing comfort.
  • Neck & Fretboard: Finished maple neck with a 6-bolt neck plate for stability.
  • Hardware: Chrome bridge with fleece mute kit assemblies (transitional for this era) and open-gear clover tuners.

Used Asis - Comes with a Hard Case

item.title: Takamine GB30CE LH NAT bass — $799
item.description:
$799 · Brand New · LV Guitars

Takamine GB30CELH-NAT G-Series Left Handed Acoustic Electric Bass in Natural Finish

The GB30CELH-NAT is a left-handed acoustic-electric bass engineered for stage performance and studio versatility. Its slim mahogany neck and soft Venetian-style cutaway deliver comfortable playability and easy upper-fret access, while the solid spruce top paired with mahogany back and sides generates the resonant, articulate tone essential for modern bass work.

Construction & Playability

The dovetail neck joint and solid spruce top ensure structural integrity and tonal clarity across the instrument's range. A 16"-radius rosewood fingerboard with 1.77" nut width provides the ergonomic foundation for precise intonation and smooth technique, supported by synthetic bone nut and bridge saddle for reliable sustain and clarity.

Electronics & Tone Shaping

The onboard Takamine TK-40B preamp system delivers comprehensive tone control with a built-in tuner, three-band EQ, gain controls, mid-shift control, bass-boost switch, and EQ bypass switch—giving you real-time flexibility whether navigating studio sessions or live performance environments. These tools allow precise frequency sculpting from warm, round low-end to articulate, punchy midrange character.

Key Features
  • Solid spruce top for tonal resonance and projection
  • Mahogany back and sides for warm, focused bass response
  • Mahogany neck with dovetail joint for structural stability
  • 16"-radius rosewood fingerboard
  • 1.77" nut width (45 mm)
  • Soft Venetian-style cutaway for upper-fret access
  • Takamine TK-40B preamp with tuner, three-band EQ, and bass boost
  • Mid-shift control and EQ bypass switch
  • Synthetic bone nut and bridge saddle
  • Rosewood headcap with pearl dot inlays
  • Abalone rosette
  • Chrome die-cast tuners
  • Gloss natural finish

The GB30CELH-NAT combines meticulous construction with professional-grade electronics, delivering a left-handed instrument ready for the demands of gigging musicians and recording sessions.

item.title: Ibanez AWB50CE-LG Artwood Series Acoustic Electric Bass in Natural Low Gloss Finish — $399.99
item.description:
$399.99 · Brand New · LV Guitars

Ibanez AWB50CE-LG Artwood Series Acoustic Electric Bass in Natural Low Gloss Finish

The AWB50CE-LG delivers the balanced response and ergonomic playability expected from a 34" scale acoustic bass, with a cutaway dreadnought body that accommodates both seated and standing positions. Ibanez engineered the Artwood series to honor acoustic tradition while incorporating modern electronics and construction techniques, resulting in an instrument that bridges classic tonal aesthetics with contemporary amplification needs. The low gloss natural finish reveals the wood grain while resisting the reflectivity of high-gloss alternatives.

Construction & Tonal Foundation

A solid Sitka spruce top with X bracing pairs with mahogany back and sides to establish a warm, balanced acoustic response characteristic of traditional bass design. The mahogany neck, rosewood fingerboard, and rosewood bridge create a cohesive tonal path, while bone nut and saddle components support clear sustain and reliable intonation across all registers.

Electronics & Playability

The Ibanez Under Saddle Pickup and SPT Shape Shifter preamp with onboard tuner provide reliable amplification and quick setup verification without external devices. The cutaway body combined with 20 frets grants easy access to upper register positions, while the 34" scale and graduated neck dimensions—from 22mm thickness at the first fret to 23mm at the seventh—support precise fingerwork and reduced hand fatigue during extended sessions.

Key Features
  • Solid Sitka spruce top with X bracing and black binding
  • Mahogany back, sides, and neck
  • Rosewood fingerboard and bridge
  • Cutaway dreadnought body shape
  • 34" scale, four-string construction, 20-fret fingerboard
  • Bone nut and saddle
  • Chrome die-cast tuners
  • Ibanez Under Saddle Pickup with SPT Shape Shifter preamp
  • Onboard tuner
  • Natural low gloss finish
  • Body length 20", width 15 3/4", max depth 5"
  • Nut width 43mm, 14th-fret width 58mm

The AWB50CE-LG combines traditional acoustic bass construction with practical modern electronics, making it suitable for studio recording, amplified ensemble work, or unplugged practice.

The new V-Mod II Precision Bass V split-coil pickup is more articulate than ever while delivering the punch and growl the P Bass® is known for.

The American Pro II Precision Bass V delivers instant familiarity and sonic versatility you'll feel and hear right away, with broad ranging improvements that add up to nothing less than a new standard for professional instruments.

Features
Single V-Mod II split-coil Precision Bass V pickup
'63 P Bass neck profile
Bone nut; 20 narrow-tall frets for familiar playing feel
HiMass™ Vintage bridge for increased sustain
Tapered-shaft tuning machines; Posiflex™ graphite rods for neck reinforcement
Includes Deluxe Molded hardshell case

item.title: Yamaha BB734A Electric Bass Guitar - Trans Matte Black — $899.99
item.description:
$899.99 · Brand New · Chuck Levin's Washington Music Center


The Workhorse - The Yamaha BB734A Electric Bass Guitar in Trans Matte Black

Music isn't just something you “do” anymore— it's life. Every time you get on stage or hit the record button you've got to feel content in the knowledge that you’re playing an instrument with the versatility, durability and superb sound that will guarantee your performances are consistently on point. Combining the crisp, penetrating tone and serious flexibility of active pickups with the punch and sustain of a 6-bolt miter neck joint, 700 models can be relied on to deliver an extraordinarily versatile sound that you can adapt to any genre or environment.

SPECIFICATIONS

Body

  • Body Construction: Alder/Maple/Alder

Neck

  • Neck Construction: 5-Piece

Hardware

  • Bridge: Vintage Plus With Convertible Bridge And Saddles
  • Tuning Machines: Lightweight Open-Gear Tuners

Electronics

  • Pickups: YGD Custom V7 Pickups (Alnico V)
  • EQ: 3-Band Active EQ
  • Battery Indicator: Battery Alert LED

Manufacturer: Yamaha
Model: BB734A TMBL
SKU: I501418-N-1-WHXE
UPC: 889025113175

We are Chuck Levin's Washington Music Center

Since 1958, Chuck Levin’s Washington Music Center has been the trusted destination for musicians and audio professionals across Maryland, Virginia, and Washington, D.C. Family-owned and operated, our legendary music store delivers Everything in Music®—from instruments and recording gear to pro audio, rentals, and repair services.

Our team of musicians and industry experts lives and breathes gear, helping you build the perfect setup for your next performance, studio session, or installation. As an authorized dealer for top brands, we also offer our award-winning CHUCKSCLUSIVE line—exclusive, limited-edition instruments and collaborations recognized with the NAMM Top 100 Dealer Innovation Award for redefining what a music retail experience can be.

Chuck Levin’s isn’t just a store—it’s a community built by players, engineers, and creators who share a lifelong passion for sound. Stop by our legendary Wheaton, MD showroom or contact us anytime for expert advice, product questions, or the best possible deal on your next piece of gear.
